name: GBs
description: GB's custom Claude Code plugins for productivity and automation

plugins.name: contratos-sociais
plugins.description: Brazilian corporate contract automation: convert PDF/DOCX contracts to structured JSON and generate contract amendments for Junta Comercial registration.

plugins.name: template-filler
plugins.description: Automate professional document generation from Google Docs templates.

plugins.name: service-manifest
plugins.description: Generate .service.json manifests for integra-contador-tui from CLI SDK sources, help output, or documentation.

plugins.name: convex
plugins.description: Convex reactive backend development with TypeScript: best practice skills, MCP integration, specialized agents, and pre-commit validation hooks.

plugins.name: legalizacao-ecab
plugins.description: Create company legalizations (ABERTURA, ALTERACAO, BAIXA) in the ECAB system for Brazilian company registration processes.

plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Session lifecycle management with pause/resume workflow. Auto-detects Serena, OpenSpec, and episodic memory.

plugins.name: legalizacao-trello-deprecated
plugins.description: DEPRECATED: Company legalizations via Trello. Use legalizacao-ecab instead.
